questions.question: What is the primary goal of dimensionality reduction techniques in machine learning, and how do they improve model performance?
questions.hint: Describe the primary goal and explain its impact

questions.question: Explain the difference between principal component analysis (PCA) and t-SNE (t-distributed Stochastic Neighbor Embedding). How are they used in practice?
questions.hint: Compare PCA and t-SNE, and describe their applications

questions.question: What is feature scaling, and why is it necessary in machine learning? Provide an example of how to perform feature scaling using the StandardScaler from scikit-learn?
questions.hint: Describe feature scaling, and provide code example
